name: RPC Portmapper DUMP Request Detected
description: Palo Alto Networks detection for RPC Portmapper DUMP Request Detected. This alert indicates that an RPC Portmapper DUMP request has been detected. Responses to these requests provide a list of RPC services that are available on a Unix server and what ports they map to. These requests are often normal, but they may also be used by attackers to conduct reconnaissance on a server.
author: James Vargas
